shaki.title: Avner Chayishaki
shaki.summary: New-build apartment — full replanning and interior design.
shaki.cardSubtitle: Upgrade and replanning for a contractor apartment
shaki.cardBody: A project for Avner Chayishaki — a new contractor apartment that went through a full replanning and interior design process, with the aim of creating a modern, precise, and comfortable home for everyday life.
shaki.testimonialLead: Professional, precise guidance — the result matches exactly what we imagined,
shaki.testimonialHighlight: and the home feels complete and pleasant to live in.
shaki.detailBody:
We started from a new-build apartment with a basic layout — the goal was to upgrade the plan and create a coherent, tailored home for the family.

We carried out a full renovation and comprehensive replanning alongside complete interior design: selective replanning where needed, materials, lighting, and furnishings that support daily life with comfort and clarity.

The result is a home that feels personal — functional, inviting, and consistent in every room.
